name: Anitun DXIII
shortDesc: Automatic transmission fluid for smooth shifting. Compatible with DEXRON III specifications.
description: The Bagani Anitun DXIII is an automatic transmission fluid formulated to meet DEXRON III specifications. It ensures smooth, reliable shifting and long-lasting transmission protection for a wide range of vehicles.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! Compatible with GM DEXRON III and other ATF specifications.

features.title: DEXRON III Compatible
features.desc: Meets GM DEXRON III specifications for wide vehicle compatibility.

features.title: Smooth Shifting
features.desc: Optimized friction characteristics for consistent, smooth gear changes.

features.title: Thermal Stability
features.desc: Maintains performance across extreme temperature ranges.

faqs.q: Can I use Anitun DXIII in my power steering?
faqs.a: Yes, DEXRON III ATF is commonly used in power steering systems. Check your vehicle's manual to confirm ATF compatibility.

faqs.q: Is this compatible with my vehicle?
faqs.a: Anitun DXIII is compatible with most vehicles that specify DEXRON III or equivalent ATF. Always check your owner's manual.

faqs.q: How often should I change transmission fluid?
faqs.a: Most manufacturers recommend every 50,000-80,000 km. Severe conditions may require more frequent changes.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines.
